reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Switch Connection
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address, community string, or SNMP port. A connection test will run before saving.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the switch. Check the IP address, SNMP port, and community string.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the logs for details.

error.invalid_oid: Invalid OID format. Use dotted numeric notation (e.g. 1.3.6.1.2.1.1.1.0) or leave blank.

options.title: Configure Switch Port Card Pro
options.description: Customize OIDs and port settings for your switch

data.re_detect_ports: Re-run port detection on save (overwrites port list)
data.include_vlans: Enable VLAN monitoring (disable to skip VLAN walks)
data.oid_rx: Life-time RX Counter OID (for live RX calculation)
data.oid_tx: Life-time TX Counter OID (for live TX calculation)
data.oid_poe_power: PoE Power OID (per-port power in mW)
data.oid_memory: Memory Usage OID (used bytes, or percentage if memory total is blank)
data.oid_memory_total: Memory Total OID (total bytes; enables used/total % calculation)
data.oid_custom: Custom OID (displayed in system info box)
